name: 系绳匕首（★） | 枯焦之色
nameZh: 系绳匕首（★） | 枯焦之色
descriptionEn: This fixed-blade survival knife is designed to withstand being used as both a weapon and a tool, such as for setting traps, hunting animals or cutting foliage. The handle is wrapped in a length of multi-purpose paracord. It has been spray-painted in a sun-dappled pattern. The Phoenix is not a symbol of destruction... it's a symbol of rebirth - Valeria Jenner, Revolutionary
descriptionZh: 这把拥有固定刀片的求生刀具为多功能用刀，即可充当武器也可用作工具。比如：可用来布置陷阱，狩猎野兽或砍断树枝。刀具握把用多功能伞绳裹住。 这把武器被漆上了阳光斑驳图案。 “凤凰”不是毁灭的象征… 恰恰相反，它象征着重生 - 革命者瓦莱里娅.琴纳
